_meta.description: Exercise catalog seed for DoNext gym module. Insert into gym_exercises with user_id = NULL (global). Weight always logged in kg. rep_low/rep_high are starting defaults the user can override per program slot.
_meta.evidence_note: Volume landmarks (MEV/MAV/MRV) and exercise selection follow the consensus of Schoenfeld et al. hypertrophy meta-analyses and the Renaissance Periodization volume framework (Israetel/Hoffmann). RIR 1-3 on working sets; last set of an exercise may approach failure. Tempo: controlled eccentric ~2-3s, no bouncing.
_meta.execution_cue_purpose: Shown in the logging screen as a one-line form reminder. Kept short and imperative.

exercises.name: Incline dumbbell press
exercises.execution_cue: Bench 30-45 deg. Lower to upper chest, elbows ~45 deg from torso, full stretch at bottom, press up and slightly in.

exercises.name: Flat barbell bench press
exercises.execution_cue: Shoulder blades retracted and down, slight arch. Bar to mid-chest, elbows tucked ~75 deg, drive feet into floor.

exercises.name: Flat dumbbell press
exercises.execution_cue: Deeper stretch than barbell. Lower under control, press without clanking dumbbells together.

exercises.name: Machine chest press
exercises.execution_cue: Seat height so handles are at mid-chest. Full stretch, controlled press, don't lock out hard.

exercises.name: Pec deck / cable fly
exercises.execution_cue: Slight elbow bend held constant. Squeeze chest at midline, big stretch at the back. No arm pressing.

exercises.name: Weighted dip (chest lean)
exercises.execution_cue: Lean torso forward, flare elbows slightly, descend to deep stretch, press up. Add weight via belt.

exercises.name: Weighted pull-up
exercises.execution_cue: Full hang, pull elbows down and back, chest to bar, control the descent. Add weight via belt.

exercises.name: Lat pulldown
exercises.execution_cue: Slight lean back, pull bar to upper chest, drive elbows down, control back up to full stretch.

exercises.name: Chest-supported row
exercises.execution_cue: Chest stays on pad. Row to lower ribs, squeeze shoulder blades, full stretch forward. No torso swing.

exercises.name: Barbell row
exercises.execution_cue: Hinge ~45 deg, flat back, pull bar to lower stomach, control down. Keep core braced.

exercises.name: T-bar row
exercises.execution_cue: Flat back, drive elbows back, squeeze at top, full stretch. Chest up throughout.

exercises.name: Single-arm dumbbell row
exercises.execution_cue: Hand and knee on bench, flat back. Row to hip, full stretch at bottom, no twisting.

exercises.name: Straight-arm pulldown
exercises.execution_cue: Arms nearly straight, hinge slightly. Pull bar to thighs using lats, control back up.

exercises.name: Overhead press (barbell)
exercises.execution_cue: Brace hard, bar from front delts, press overhead and move head through. Lock out, control down.

exercises.name: Seated dumbbell shoulder press
exercises.execution_cue: Back supported, press from ear height to overhead, full stretch at bottom, no clanking.

exercises.name: Dumbbell lateral raise
exercises.execution_cue: Slight forward lean, lead with elbows, raise to shoulder height, control down. Light weight, no swing.

exercises.name: Cable lateral raise
exercises.execution_cue: Cable behind body for constant tension. Raise to shoulder height, slow return. Best lateral variation.

exercises.name: Machine lateral raise
exercises.execution_cue: Pads on outer forearms, push out and up to shoulder height, control down. No momentum.

exercises.name: Rear delt cable fly
exercises.execution_cue: Cross cables, pull out and back leading with the elbow/pinky, squeeze rear delt, slow return.

exercises.name: Reverse pec deck
exercises.execution_cue: Slight elbow bend, pull handles out and back, squeeze shoulder blades, control return.

exercises.name: Face pull
exercises.execution_cue: Rope at face height, pull to forehead, externally rotate (knuckles back), squeeze, control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell curl
exercises.execution_cue: Elbows pinned at sides, curl without swinging, full squeeze, 2-3s lower to full extension.

exercises.name: Incline dumbbell curl
exercises.execution_cue: Bench ~45-60 deg, arms hang back for max long-head stretch. Curl, squeeze, slow controlled negative.

exercises.name: Hammer curl
exercises.execution_cue: Neutral grip (thumbs up). Hits brachialis + brachioradialis. No swing, control the negative.

exercises.name: Cable curl
exercises.execution_cue: Constant tension through the range. Elbows fixed, full squeeze, slow eccentric, full stretch.

exercises.name: Preacher curl
exercises.execution_cue: Upper arms flat on pad. Strong stretch at bottom (don't fully lock under load), squeeze top.

exercises.name: Barbell / EZ-bar curl
exercises.execution_cue: Elbows at sides, curl without leaning back, squeeze, control down to full extension.

exercises.name: Triceps pushdown
exercises.execution_cue: Elbows pinned to sides, extend fully, squeeze, control back to ~90 deg. No shoulder/torso help.

exercises.name: Overhead cable extension
exercises.execution_cue: Face away from stack, rope overhead, big stretch behind head, extend fully. Best long-head stretch.

exercises.name: Skull crusher (EZ-bar)
exercises.execution_cue: Lower bar to forehead/just behind, elbows fairly fixed, extend. Control the stretch.

exercises.name: Close-grip bench press
exercises.execution_cue: Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked, bar to lower chest, press emphasizing triceps lockout.

exercises.name: Back squat
exercises.execution_cue: Brace, break at hips and knees together, descend to at-least-parallel, drive up through midfoot.

exercises.name: Hack squat
exercises.execution_cue: Feet lower/closer for quad bias. Deep controlled descent, drive up without locking hard.

exercises.name: Leg press
exercises.execution_cue: Feet mid-platform, lower to deep knee bend without lower back rounding, press through heels.

exercises.name: Bulgarian split squat
exercises.execution_cue: Rear foot elevated, drop straight down on front leg, drive through front heel. Stay upright for quads.

exercises.name: Leg extension
exercises.execution_cue: Extend to near-lockout, squeeze quads hard, control down. Pause at top for extra stimulus.

exercises.name: Romanian deadlift
exercises.execution_cue: Soft knees, push hips back, bar close to legs, feel hamstring stretch, drive hips forward to stand.

exercises.name: Seated leg curl
exercises.execution_cue: Curl heels under, squeeze hamstrings, control the return. Seated bias stretches hams more.

exercises.name: Lying leg curl
exercises.execution_cue: Hips down on pad, curl fully, squeeze, slow controlled negative. Don't let hips rise.

exercises.name: Standing calf raise
exercises.execution_cue: Full stretch at bottom (heel below step), explosive up, 1-2s pause at top stretch. No bouncing.

exercises.name: Seated calf raise
exercises.execution_cue: Bent knee targets soleus. Deep stretch, full contraction, controlled tempo.

exercises.name: Hanging leg raise
exercises.execution_cue: Posterior pelvic tilt, raise legs by curling pelvis up, control down. Don't swing.

exercises.name: Cable crunch
exercises.execution_cue: Kneel, rope by head, crunch by flexing spine (not hips), squeeze abs, control back up.

exercises.name: Wrist curl
exercises.execution_cue: Forearms on thighs, curl wrists up, full range, control down. High reps work best.

exercises.name: Reverse wrist curl
exercises.execution_cue: Palms down, extend wrists up, control down. Lighter than wrist curls; trains extensors.
